items.q: How to book a tour or service?
items.a: Submit a request via the form on the Contact page or call us. Our manager will contact you within one business day.

items.q: How to get to the tour venue?
items.a: The «How to get there» section has detailed routes from different cities. Address and coordinates for navigation are also listed there.
Cash on arrival, bank card. Online payment is available after registration in your personal account.
Yes. Contact us by email or phone as soon as possible. Refund conditions are clarified at the time of booking.

hero.subtitle: Create vivid memories with us!
hero.slide1Subtitle: discovering unique places and exciting routes
hero.slide2Subtitle: We will make your active holiday unforgettable!
hero.slide3Title: Ride the wave of bright emotions

about.title: Travel agency «Nemnovo Tour» — 16 years of successful organization of your holiday.
about.p1: We organize tours and holidays in Belarus: excursions, kayaking, active recreation and trips around the country.
about.p2: We focus on guests from Grodno, Minsk and all of Belarus.
points: Creative and responsible managers who will plan the most interesting route and fully organize your holiday
Experienced and caring instructors who will accompany you during active recreation and make it as safe as possible
Guides in love with their work who will take you on a time machine to the exciting world of Belarusian Renaissance and the era of kings!

reviews.text: Quiet place, nature, everything is welcoming. Recommend.
reviews.author: Anna, Grodno

reviews.text: Family trip — kids loved it, we'll come back.
reviews.author: Dmitry, Minsk

reviews.text: Clean, cosy, attentive hosts. Great fishing.
reviews.author: Sergey, Vitebsk

reviews.text: Third year here — always warm and peaceful.
reviews.author: Olga & Igor, Grodno

reviews.text: Kids had a blast, we relaxed. Sauna is great!
reviews.author: Alexey, Minsk

reviews.text: Nature, silence, campfire by the water — perfect weekend.
reviews.author: Maria, Brest

reviews.text: Just like the photos, even better. Thanks for the hospitality!
reviews.author: Natalia, Gomel

excursions.title: Excursions in Belarus
excursions.intro: Immerse yourself in the exciting world of the past of Grodno, Brest and all of Belarus. Guided and themed excursions for groups and individual tourists.
excursions.cta: Want to book an excursion? Submit a request and we will select a route for you.

visafree.title: Brest Grodno Visa Free
visafree.p1: Brest Grodno Visa Free is the territory of Brest city and districts of Brest and Grodno regions forming the visa-free zone. No visa required for entry.
visafree.p2: Tourists from 73 countries can visit the territory for up to 15 days and enjoy unique historical and architectural monuments.
visafree.mapTitle: Online map of the visa-free territory
